name: Karl Kaisser Sipe
bio: I build AI-powered applications and full-stack web products that solve real problems. Focused on the intersection of machine learning and modern web development — turning complex systems into intuitive, fast experiences.

projects.title: Neural Chat
projects.desc: Conversational AI assistant with persistent memory and document Q&A, powered by LangChain, FastAPI, and React.

projects.title: TaskFlow
projects.desc: Full-stack project management app with real-time collaboration, authentication, and drag-and-drop task boards.

projects.title: SentimentLens
projects.desc: ML-powered REST API that classifies text sentiment and emotion from social media data using a fine-tuned model.

projects.title: This Portfolio
projects.desc: Built from scratch with vanilla HTML, CSS, and JS — featuring a particle canvas, aurora animations, and a clean project grid.
